approval_gates.trigger: Use an authenticated Ableton, Arturia, or other vendor account session.

required_evidence: price or license terms visible to user
approval_gates.trigger: Buy, license, activate, or materially change entitlement state for a vendor product.

local_recommended_items.name: Inspired by Nature

local_recommended_items.name: Granulator III

local_recommended_items.name: Augmented STRINGS

local_recommended_items.name: Augmented WOODWINDS
local_recommended_items.project_use: Breath-like hybrid motion, ghost harmonies, and eerie counterlines.

official_vendor_routes.operator_route: Ableton Live Browser > Packs, or authenticated Ableton account page for already licensed content.
official_vendor_routes.supervised_automation_boundary: Use official Ableton UI/account surfaces only after approval; record redacted receipts and refresh inventory.

official_vendor_routes.operator_route: Arturia Software Center, Arturia product page, or authenticated Arturia account page.
official_vendor_routes.supervised_automation_boundary: Use official Arturia UI/account surfaces only after approval; record redacted receipts and refresh inventory.

purpose: Metadata-only operator queue for approval-gated Ableton and Arturia library/account actions.

automation_steps: Review source_url on the official vendor host.
Confirm entitlement, account session, and purchase boundary outside CI.
Perform the approved vendor UI/app action through a supervised authenticated session.
Refresh inventory with the tracked inventory script.
Record a redacted receipt under the ignored local receipt root before updating tracked metadata.
